name_cn:
Authentic Grade
5B, Miu Miu new mini bowling bag, this Arcadie leather mini handbag conveys a fashion concept of transforming reflections on current reality into a unique silhouette, a soft and full design makes the bag look more plump, showcasing a metropolitan style, tonal letter logo, endowing this tote with unique beauty and a classic vibe, detachable and adjustable leather shoulder strap, cotton satin lining with card slot, size: 19X10X5cm
